name: ANR Roofing
seoDescription: ANR Roofing of Petaluma — a licensed, family-owned father-and-son roofing contractor serving Petaluma, Santa Rosa and Sonoma County since 2004

sections.heading: Sonoma County's family-run roofing contractor since 2004
sections.subheading: ANR Roofing is a licensed, father-and-son roofing company in Petaluma — full-service residential and commercial roofing, leak repair and dry-rot work across Sonoma County, done on time and priced

sections.heading: About ANR Roofing
body: ANR Roofing of Petaluma is a family-owned, father-and-son roofing company that has served Petaluma, Santa Rosa and the wider Sonoma County since 2004. Owner Eloy “Rigo” Rigoberto and his crew handle the whole job themselves, from the first inspection to the final cleanup.

From routine maintenance and leak repair to extensive dry-rot and decking replacement and complete residential or commercial re-roofs, ANR is known for doing careful, code-correct work on time and at a fair price. The company is fully licensed and insured under California contractor's license #849115.

items.title: Roof Repair & Leak Repair
items.description: Fast diagnosis and repair of leaks, storm damage and worn roofing — patched right so it lasts.

items.title: Re-Roofs & Replacement
items.description: Complete residential and commercial re-roofs in composition shingle, tile and flat systems.

items.title: Dry Rot & Decking
items.description: Expert repair of dry rot and damaged decking uncovered during tear-off, handled before the new roof goes on.

items.title: Inspections & Maintenance
items.description: Roof inspections and preventative maintenance to catch problems early and extend the life of your roof.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message ANR Roofing and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

items.title: Family-Owned Father-And-Son Crew
items.body: Rooted right here in Petaluma, CA, with a real stake in doing it right.

items.title: Serving Sonoma County Since 2004
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.title: Licensed & Insured · CSLB #849115
items.body: Properly credentialed, so the work is covered and done to standard.

items.title: Residential & Commercial Roofing
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.title: Leak Repair, Dry-Rot & Full Re-Roofs
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

sections.heading: Work with ANR Roofing
sections.body: Find us at 2044 Willow Dr. Call (707) 548-9576 — we’re glad to help.
